title: achillea occidentalis
intro: Achillea occidentalis, also known as Western Yarrow, is a flowering plant species native to western North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Western Yarrow include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its use as a natural antihistamine to alleviate allergies and cold symptoms. Western Yarrow can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
